---
title: "Schedule and Material"
author: "Davi Moreira"
editor: visual
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table { font-size: 0.85rem; width: 100%; line-height: 1.2; }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.3rem; text-align: left; word-wrap: break-word; vertical-align: top;
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) { width: 6%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(2), .overflow-table td:nth-child(2) { width: 10%; }
  .below-table { font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.2; margin-top: 1rem; }
</style>
```

# Course Schedule

> **Placeholder.** The full Fall 2026 **Monday / Wednesday / Friday** sequence is
> designed in the curriculum-planning session, anchored to the official Purdue
> Fall 2026 academic calendar and the Fall Undergraduate Research Conference
> poster date. The table harness below is kept from the course infrastructure;
> each row maps to one class session or unit. Colab badges are optional — added
> only when a light activity notebook backs the session.

::: overflow-table

| Week | Date | Topic | Session | Activity | Deliverable | Materials |
|------|------|-------|---------|----------|-------------|-----------|
| 1 | TBD | Launchpad: course map, tools, and the Ask → Verify → Document AI policy | Session 00 | *TBD* | Readiness check | Brightspace orientation |
| 1 | TBD | From curiosity to a research gap | Session 01 | *TBD* | — | *TBD* |
| … | … | *(remaining sessions designed in the curriculum session)* | | | | |

:::

::: below-table

## Core Course References

- *Research-methods and evidence-appraisal readings — curated list added during
  curriculum design.*

:::
